entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop susceptible to aflatoxin contamination in various production environments.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The contamination of groundnut seeds by aflatoxins produced by fungi, leading to economic and health issues.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus capable of producing aflatoxins and invading groundnut seeds.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS PARASITICUS
entities.description: A fungus capable of producing aflatoxins and invading groundnut seeds.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An environment conducive to preharvest aflatoxin contamination, especially during drought.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A weather condition that increases the susceptibility of groundnut to preharvest aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: WET AND HUMID AREAS
entities.description: Environments where postharvest aflatoxin contamination is more prevalent.

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management practices used to minimize aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: PRODUCE-HANDLING PRACTICES
entities.description: Post-harvest handling techniques used to minimize aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: STORAGE PRACTICES
entities.description: Techniques used during storage to minimize aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO AFLATOXIN-PRODUCING FUNGI
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to resist invasion by fungi that produce aflatoxins.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to resist the production of aflatoxins even if fungi are present.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach used to develop cultivars with resistance to aflatoxin-producing fungi or aflatoxin production.

entities.name: GENETIC MANIPULATION
entities.description: The process of altering genetic makeup to alleviate aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: ECONOMIC LOSSES
entities.description: Financial damages resulting from aflatoxin contamination in groundnut production.

entities.name: HEALTH HAZARDS
entities.description: Risks to human health caused by the consumption of aflatoxin-contaminated groundnuts.
